hero.title: Run your sports team
hero.subtitle: The team management platform that replaces your spreadsheets, group chats, and paper forms.
hero.subtitleHighlight: One app for your entire organization.

problem.iceTime: Another parent call about ice time.
problem.description: Managing a team shouldn't mean juggling a dozen tools and a group chat that never stops.

features.title: Finally, one app that does it all
features.subtitle: Stop juggling tools. Start running your team.

scheduling.title: Scheduling that syncs
scheduling.description: Games, practices, and events. Everyone sees the same schedule. RSVP with one tap.

roster.title: Roster management
roster.description: Player profiles, positions, jersey numbers. Invite parents with a link.

medical.title: Medical compliance
medical.description: HIPAA-compliant injury reports. CRT5 concussion protocols. Return-to-play tracking. Hockey Canada forms built-in.

attendance.title: Instant attendance
attendance.description: No more 'who's coming?' group texts. Real-time headcounts for every event.

ticketing.title: Built-in ticketing
ticketing.description: Parents submit issues in one place. No more calls, texts, or emails flooding your phone.

payments.title: Payment tracking
payments.description: See who's paid, who hasn't, and how much is outstanding. No spreadsheets.

platforms.title: Software for every level of sport
platforms.subtitle: From youth rec leagues to professional franchises.

teamops.title: TeamOps
teamops.description: Everything your team needs in one app. Scheduling, rosters, medical compliance, payments, and communication—built for managers, coaches, trainers, parents, and players.

proinvest.title: ProInvest Ecosystem
proinvest.description: Enterprise fan engagement infrastructure. White-label mobile apps, real-time contests, lifetime loyalty programs, and first-party analytics for pro sports teams.

accelerators.title: Canada's top accelerators believe in what we're building

nextai.title: NextAI Cohort 8
nextai.description: Canada's premier AI accelerator. We completed the program and presented at Demo Day September 2025.

zerolabs.title: ZeroLabs Cohort 6
zerolabs.description: Innovation Launch Pad focused on commercialization and market entry. Completed October 2025.

aboutTeaser.title: Built by coaches. For coaches.
aboutTeaser.description: We've spent years managing youth hockey teams—chasing RSVPs, tracking injuries on paper, and scrambling over practice plans and game rosters. We built TeamOps because we needed it ourselves.

finalCta.title: Ready to simplify your season?
finalCta.description: Join teams already using TeamOps to run smoother seasons. Free during beta.
